name: Jacob Chaffin
summary: Full-stack engineer with 7+ years building and operating production AI and real-time systems. Architected and scaled conversational infrastructure to 6M+ users while maintaining sub-200ms latency and 99.9% uptime. Designs agentic workflows with LangGraph, event-driven backends using Kafka, and production LLM APIs optimized for streaming (SSE, WebSockets), RAG, and vector retrieval. Trained and deployed custom PyTorch models on GPU-enabled Kubernetes and shipped real-time voice agents with LiveKit and Pipecat. Skilled in Python, Node.js/TypeScript, Next.js/React, and GraphQL/Apollo Gateway; proven at delivering low-latency, highly available ML-backed services.

projects.name: Prosody.ai
projects.description: Architected ProsodySSM, a speech intelligence framework utilizing a 4-layer Mamba SSM with linear O(n) complexity for long-context audio processing. Shipped a streaming audio ingest system with pre-ASR feature extraction, delivering sub-200ms p95 inference for live agent guidance and post-call analytics. Built a multi-tenant product in TypeScript/Next.js featuring strict tenant isolation, RBAC, and comprehensive auditability for enterprise QA and search dashboards. Developed a GRU-based Forward Prediction engine with 8 predictive heads to track session-level outcomes like Escalation Risk and CSAT with sequence-length confidence scaling. Engineered a 32-dimensional prosodic feature extraction suite (F0, Energy, HNR, Jitter) running parallel to ASR for real-time VAD (Valence-Arousal-Dominance) regression.

projects.name: Sparke
projects.description: Mobile tutoring app with a LiveKit-powered talking avatar. LLM orchestration with RAG, Twilio telephony, and Kafka-driven ELO feedback.

projects.name: AureliaStudio.AI
projects.description: Built a multi-tenant voice AI platform for luxury MedSpas. Orchestrated real-time booking, payments, memberships, and intake flows using a LangGraph state machine with dynamic STT/LLM/TTS routing (including Orpheus TTS) per call. Deployed LiveKit Cloud (WebRTC + SIP), Apollo Federation across 5 GraphQL services, Stripe Connect for per-tenant payments, and AWS infrastructure provisioned via Terraform. Uses Kafka for event-driven workflows, async domain events, and cross-service coordination at scale.

projects.name: Realtime Metrics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time voice AI analytics dashboard. KPI scoring with Pinecone, latency monitoring, and Pipecat Cloud call orchestration.

experience.description: Founding engineer on AureliaStudio’s multi-tenant voice stack for luxury MedSpas. Full product arc, stack, and shipping detail live under the AureliaStudio.AI featured project.
Prosody intelligence platform and ProsodyCRM — architecture, models, and APIs. Deep technical narrative lives under the Prosody.ai featured project.

Architected and owned the real-time voice call and conversational avatar infrastructure for Spark.E and TutorMe, scaling the systems to support 6M+ users and a $11.5M Series A. Engineered a LiveKit-based agent over WebRTC to handle synchronized live audio, video, and the Spark.E avatar’s interactive state, achieving sub-100ms conversational latency. Developed a custom LiveKit DataChannel pipeline to inject study-set context and session state into the LLM, ensuring the avatar’s responses were grounded in assigned materials. Designed and deployed a Node.js authentication and token service on GCP utilizing JWT/LiveKit access tokens and Twilio SMS verification for high-concurrency access. Implemented a Kafka-driven ELO feedback pipeline to analyze session data in real-time and dynamically adapt student learning paths based on performance metrics. Managed the end-to-end voice session lifecycle and connection stability, ensuring 99.9% uptime during massive global traffic spikes.

Built and operated production backend services for conversational AI, shipping low-latency APIs and streaming interfaces used by voice workflows. Owned deployment automation for model-backed services, including CI/CD, environment promotion, canary-style rollouts, and reproducible builds across multiple environments. Implemented observability for real-time systems (structured logging, metrics, tracing, alerting), reducing time-to-diagnosis for latency regressions and incident response. Integrated speech and language components into stable production pipelines, evolving systems from classic NLU patterns toward LLM-backed orchestration where it improved product outcomes. Designed service boundaries and data contracts for multi-tenant operation, with attention to reliability under concurrent traffic and failure-mode handling. Built internal tooling to speed iteration (evaluation harnesses, replay workflows, regression checks), improving confidence when shipping changes to live traffic. Partnered cross-functionally with product and applied teams to translate model behavior into deployable, measurable services, and to close gaps discovered in production.

Built custom TensorFlow ops to simulate neural network execution on the DPU Compiler, enabling early validation of operator behavior and alignment with hardware constraints. Developed and optimized neural networks for audio and vision classification using PyTorch. Designed and maintained an interactive visualization tool for error tracing on Wave's proprietary DPU-based compiler. Developed full-stack admin tools with Node.js, React, and GraphQL for secure login and data transfer to AWS S3, deployed via Docker containers. Reduced API payload size by 40% and streamlined file management workflows.
